description: A fantasy illustration depicting two winged figures standing on a small rocky island surrounded by vivid blue ocean waters. One figure has dark skin and translucent green-yellow butterfly wings, while the other has blue skin and pale blue crystalline wings. They stand in an intimate embrace. The sky is partly cloudy with warm light, and distant islands or rock formations dot the horizon. A flower or cloth in yellow lies at their feet on the island. The style is hyper-realistic fantasy illustration.
